name: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee timesheets/week tool
description: For HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee timesheets/week, unmonitored overtime causes budget overruns. We alert HR ops when overtime thresholds are exceeded instead of manual tracking of timesheets and overtime calculations.
target_audience: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee timesheets/week
problem_solved: Overtime management leading to budget overruns.
